title: Mediheal Official Best Korean Sheet Mask - Collagen Essential Face Mask 10 Sheets Lifting and Firming For All Skin Types Value Sets
breadCrumbs: Beauty & Personal Care > Skin Care > Face > Treatments & Masks > Masks

items.title: Ingredients
items.text: Water, Glycerine, Methylpropanediol, Propanediol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Hydrolyzed Extensin (Carrot Collagen 1,200Ppm), Panthenol, Betaine, Trehalose, Adenosine, Disodium EDTA, Carbomer, Arginine, Octyldodeceth-16, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Polyacrylate, Glycine, Glutamic Acid, Aspartic Acid, Tremella Fuciformis Polysaccharide*(10 Ppm), Sodium Chloride, Soluble Collagen (Vegan Collagen 1Ppm), Serine, Histidine, Alanine, Threonine, Proline, Acrylates/​C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Hibiscus Rosa-Sinensis Flower Extract*(0.1Ppm), Chlorella Ferment*(0.1 Ppm), Magnesium Chloride, Calcium Chloride, Mannose, Glucose, Fragrance

features: UNLEASH THE POWER OF KOREAN BEAUTY - ultimate solution to achieving a youthful, radiant complexion. This easy-to-use facial mask is designed to fit comfortably on your face, ensuring maximum absorption of our potent formula. Perfect for all skin types, our Korean collagen sheet mask is a must-have in your daily skincare routine.

FIRM, PLUMP AND RESTORE SKIN - formulated with 3x more Collagen actives than our first generation mask for an intensive firming effect. Our proprietary patented HYDRODEEPER complex with essential moisturizing factors helps improve hydration and maintain a healthy skin barrier.

COLLAGEN ACTIVE 3X COMPLEX - firms, visibly plumps and helps increase skin's elasticity for younger looking skin. Vegan Collagen, Pro Collagen Complex (Hibiscus Flower Extracts, Snow Mushroom Polysaccharides and Chlorella) and Carrot Collagen extracted from Jeju carrots intensely firms and diminishes the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

BIODEGRADABLE SHEET - This VEGAN certified, eco-friendly sheet is silky soft and firmly hugs skin for optimal absorption of our powerful essence. Enhanced mask shape comfortably fits all face shapes. Tested and safe for sensitive skin.

FSC CERTIFIED + SOY INK PRINTED CARTONS - MEDIHEAL uses sustainable packaging certified to meet the environmental and social standards for FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) and print with eco-friendly soy-based ink.

aPlusContent.title: Product description
aPlusContent.rawText:
Product description
Mediheal Collagen Essential Mask 
Firm, plump and restore skin 
Defy age and get youthful, bouncy looking skin with three different types of Collagen. This intensive anti-aging treatment mask hydrates, firms and revitalizes skin. 
How To Use 
After cleansing and toning, apply mask.
Pull upward to fit the mask tightly to face, adjusting to fit around eyes, nose and mouth. 
Relax for 10 - 20 minutes. 
Remove and discard the mask. Lightly tap remaining essence to help it absorb into skin.

aiReviewsSummary.text: Customers find the sheet mask effective, noting it works wonders for their skin and leaves it refreshed, with one mentioning it helps with wrinkles. The mask is moisturizing, with customers saying it hydrates throughout the day, and they appreciate its quality and how it makes their skin softer for days. Moreover, they report it doesn't irritate their skin at all, leaving them with a spa-like experience, and create a plump, glowing appearance. While some find it easy to use, others mention it can be difficult to unfold, and opinions about stickiness are mixed, with some finding it non-sticky while others say it gets too sticky.

keywords.name: Effectiveness
keywords.text: Customers report that the mask works wonders for their skin, making it smoother and healthier, with one customer noting it helps improve wrinkles.

partialReviews.text: Used product for many years with great results

Takes awhile to open up the mask but works well!! I use it monthly & My face feels soft & refreshed. I would buy it again!!

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Highly recommend for all skin types. ✨💆🏽‍♀️
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This Mediheal Collagen Essential Face Mask is a total skin reset in a pouch. From the first use, my skin felt noticeably firmer, smoother, and deeply hydrated. The sheet fits comfortably and adheres well without slipping, so you actually get to relax while it works.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 18, 2026

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I've been using face masks since I was little. I've tried lots of different brands and ingredients. This is my self care item, it's something I always have on hand to use when I want to unwind or my skin needs some TLC and moisture. With any sheet mask, I feel moisturized after and it's a nice feeling resting with one on. This one, however, is a step up from that in that it rejuvenates my skin times 100 compared to all other masks I've used. I don't know how to explain it, but afterwards my skin is plumper than ever and so visibly hydrated. My eyes are less puffy, my skin looks soft and I look younger! I've tried other collagen masks and they do not compare. I prefer to save these before big events because of how amazing they make me look. But the true test was this past month has been rough for me and I saw how much it affected my skin. I was using other face masks and I was exfoliating more but nothing was helping. My skin was dull, my eyes were puffy, my undereyes were dark, I had faint wrinkles from dehydration. I ordered more of these and after using just one my skin looks alive again and my confidence is back. Even my eyes look so much better. I have eye patches coming in the mail and I might just return them and buy another pack of these sheets. I very much recommend this. I also have sensitive skin and these do not irritate or break me out. I use as much natural product as I can for anything going near my skin. If I stray back to harsh products I get eczema on my face especially eyelids. So these are perfect and gentle and truly make a difference.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I do the best to take good care of my skin. I noticed that during the past few months to distress and up people of my life, on my skin has looked more tired. It’s also lack of sleep. I love to use these masks, I find that they are not only soothing, but they also refresh my skin. I’ve added this to self-care routine and I highly recommend these masks. They don’t have any strong fragrance, feel clean, they don’t irritate  and they leave my skin, soft and moisturized.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on August 20, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I got these just for the heck of it.  I'm not a person with a crazy skin routine, so pardon my lack of knowledge.  I love to use every couple of weeks after a shower to help my skin a bit.  They are a bit hard to unfold and get on my face, but once they are there, the cooling effect is very nice on my skin.  It also does leave my skin much softer for a few days after, and helps keep it from being dried out after a shower.  It's a nice treat every once and a while, instead of using lotions and such.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on June 17, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The Mediheal Collagen Essential Face Mask has quickly become one of my favorite skincare products! The collagen-infused formula really helps lift and firm my skin, leaving it feeling rejuvenated and more youthful. After just one use, I noticed my skin looked smoother, plumper, and had a natural glow.The sheet mask fits perfectly, covering my face comfortably without slipping, and the serum absorbs quickly, leaving my skin feeling nourished but not greasy. It’s also gentle on my skin, which makes it great for all skin types—even sensitive skin like mine!The pack of 4 sheets is great for keeping up with regular treatments. I love how easy it is to use; just relax for 15-20 minutes, and you’re left with noticeably brighter and more hydrated skin.This product offers great value for money, excellent functionality, and is easy to use. If you're looking for a high-quality sheet mask that provides lifting and firming effects, I highly recommend the Mediheal Collagen Essential Face Mask! Highly recommend!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on January 31, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Excellent product! My face feels like I had a SPA Day! Very Hydrating and excellent price.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I am loving it really help to moisten your face and no skin irritations and smells good.
